scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run vet && pnpm run lint:arch && pnpm run fixtures:loop && pnpm run fixtures:hash
scripts.dev: mkdir -p ui/dist/client && concurrently -k -n vite,api -c blue,green "pnpm --filter noodle-ui dev" "NOODLE_SERVER=1 NOODLE_BROWSER_URL=http://localhost:5173 NOODLE_DEV=1 go tool air -c .air.toml"
scripts.dev:verbose: mkdir -p ui/dist/client && concurrently -k -n vite,api -c blue,green "pnpm --filter noodle-ui dev" "NOODLE_SERVER=1 NOODLE_BROWSER_URL=http://localhost:5173 NOODLE_DEV=1 go tool air -d -c .air.verbose.toml"
scripts.fixtures:loop: NOODLE_LOOP_FIXTURE_MODE=check go test ./loop -run TestLoopDirectoryFixtures -count=1 && go run ./scripts/fixturehash check --root loop/testdata
scripts.fixtures:loop:record: NOODLE_LOOP_FIXTURE_MODE=record go test ./loop -run TestLoopDirectoryFixtures -count=1 && go run ./scripts/fixturehash sync --root loop/testdata
